name: onlyharness
description: OnlyHarness CLI (hh) — find, inspect, install and publish reusable AI-agent resources from onlyharness.com

scripts.bundle:
esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=dist/hh.mjs && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const p='dist/hh.mjs';let s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');s=s.replace('#!/usr/bin/env node
','#!/usr/bin/env node
import { createRequire } from ' + JSON.stringify('node:module') + ';const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);
');fs.writeFileSync(p,s);"
scripts.test: npm run bundle && node --import tsx --test test/*.test.ts
